creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
math/gnuplot was updated to 4.6.3 r316191. These changes do not
interfere with the original patch, but some modifications were made and
a new patch was created.

Again, this patch should be applied by `cd`ing to math/gnuplot and `svn
patch < patch-gnuplot.diff`.

Thanks,
Kevin Zheng
